title: Kingiella steffensii
taxonomy: Kingiella steffensii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a member of the genus Kingiella and is native to New Zealand. The Gesneriaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family consists of over 130 genera and approximately 3,000 species, many of which are epiphytes. Kingiella steffensii is a unique species within this family, with distinct characteristics that set it apart from other plants.
